title: Record abs120k, handoff 0.55, and 12k/350 tool budgets

fixtureActions.content:
# Abs120 Handoff55 Tool12k Contract

## Abs 120k
full compaction absolute soft trigger defaults to 120k tokens so long sessions reclaim earlier on large windows

## Handoff 55
UltraSwarm pre-handoff compaction targets 0.55 usage so swarm launches start with denser free headroom

## Tool 12k
tool-result budgets trim at 12k chars with 350-char previews for denser long-horizon context

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool vitest
